Container.Name: tracker
Container.Overview: LolTracker is a League of Legends multi-account tracker. Track ranks across multiple accounts, view aggregated champion statistics, look up live games with win predictions, and explore full post-game analytics with retroactive predictions. Requires a Riot Games API key from https://developer.riotgames.com/
Container.Requires: A Riot Games API key. Get one at https://developer.riotgames.com/. Optional: Anthropic API key for AI build analysis.

Config.Name: Data
Config.Description: Database and persistent data (SQLite DB lives here)

Config.Name: Riot API Key
Config.Description: Riot Games API key (starts with RGAPI-). Get one at https://developer.riotgames.com/

Config.Name: Anthropic API Key
Config.Description: Anthropic API key for AI-powered build analysis (starts with sk-ant-). Get one at https://console.anthropic.com/
